title: Secret Service missed opportunities to prevent Trump attack: watchdog
shortDescription: The Secret Service missed chances to prevent the 2024 shooting of Trump and was significantly understaffed, according to a pair of watchdog reports.

title: Hegseth slams protesters heckling Trump administration members in DC
shortDescription: Pete Hegseth slammed protesters on July 2 as he and other top members of the Trump administration praised the work of the National Guard in DC.

title: Is Mount Rushmore a victim of Trump's Washington, DC 'vanity' projects?
shortDescription: As of the end of fiscal 2025, NPS had a backlog of deferred maintenance projects totaling more than $24.2 billion.

title: Kid Rock dishes on his friendship with President Trump
shortDescription: Kid Rock discussed his friendship and late-night phone calls with President Trump in a recent interview with Sky News Australia.

title: Exclusive: US 250th event registration sent attendees to GOP fundraising site
shortDescription: A Trump-linked political group asked those seeking tickets to consent to getting donation requests, but changed it after USA TODAY asked questions.

title: Fox poll shows Democrats ahead in Georgia races
shortDescription: Fox poll: Democrats lead in Georgia — Ossoff 56-43 (Senate), Bottoms 52-47 (gov), June 27.

title: Hail, wind, haze threaten smooth skies for Trump’s Mount Rushmore 250
shortDescription: Warm holiday weather, scattered severe storms and wildfire haze could briefly disrupt crowds, fireworks and flyovers at Trump’s Mount Rushmore 250 event.

title: Donald Trump defends new fortune from cryptocurrency
shortDescription: President Donald Trump made $1.4 billion in 2025 from cryptocurrency, including his $TRUMP meme coin.

title: Tucker Carlson eyes new third party after break with President Trump
shortDescription: Tucker Carlson says he plans to help launch a third party after breaking with President Donald Trump and other Republicans over the U.S. war in Iran.

title: Republicans slam Mamdani after mayor asks NYers to turn AC to 78
shortDescription: As the city battles with a heatwave, the mayor asked that New Yorkers work to put less pressure on the power grid. Republicans disagreed.

title: Trump jokes about threesome with Medal of Honor
shortDescription: During his speech in North Dakota, the president joked that he has "seriously considered" giving himself the Congressional Medal of Honor.

title: Activists to rally for 14th Amendment's equal protections clause
shortDescription: Activists will gather July 9 at the Supreme Court to celebrate the 14th Amendment and defend civil rights protections.

title: Trump is hard to please. Has Mike Johnson cracked the code?
shortDescription: House Speaker Mike Johnson told USA TODAY he puts a lot of time working his relationship with President Donald Trump 'because that's what's required.'

title: The Housing Act will become law, with or without Trump, Johnson claims
shortDescription: House Speaker Mike Johnson sat for an exclusive interview with USA TODAY ahead of America's 250th anniversary.

title: Trump suggests he and Don Jr. or Eric should receive Medal of Honor
shortDescription: Trump jokes that he and one of his sons, either Don Jr. or Eric, should receive Medals of Honor to become third father-son duo to be awarded.

title: Trump plans long July 4 speech in extreme heat
shortDescription: President Trump says he will give a long July 4 speech in Washington despite forecasts of triple digit heat.

title: Trump won't let extreme heat stop 'really long speech' set for July 4
shortDescription: President Trump said extreme heat in the nation's capital on July 4 won't stop him from giving his big speech ahead of the fireworks celebration.

title: Trump vs Supreme Court: Who's the winner in America's biggest cases?
shortDescription: Did the Supreme Court give Trump most of what he wanted? Here are highlights of the court's biggest decisions.

title: Trump dedicates new Theodore Roosevelt library
shortDescription: Trump dedicated the new Theodore Roosevelt library in North Dakota and gifted the former president's Medal of Honor.
